title: Interrogatives part 1
html:
Interrogatives part 1 

An interrogative is a function word used to ask a question, such as what, which, when, where, who, whom, whose, why and how.

All of the words and phrases listed here cannot be used with 「は」especially, those used as subjects, they should always be marked with「が」.

「どちら」is used as a polite form of 「だれ」 and 「どこ」, like 「こちら」 in Day 1.

You can download a copy of this cheat sheet here,
